In [20]:
#Extract year and age
df['Date of Birth'] = pd.to_datetime(df['Date of Birth'], errors='coerce')
df['Date of Infraction'] = pd.to_datetime(df['Date of Infraction'], errors='coerce')

# Extract year
df['Year'] = df['Date of Infraction'].dt.year

# Calculate age at time of infraction
df['Age'] = (df['Date of Infraction'] - df['Date of Birth']).dt.days // 365

print("Year and Age columns created!")
df[['Name', 'Nationality', 'Year', 'Age']].head(10)

Year and Age columns created!

In [23]:
# Remove line breaks and standardize
df['Discipline 2'] = df['Discipline 2'].str.replace('\n', ' ', regex=False)

# Merge 'Hammer' into 'Throws' and fix 'Middle Distance'
df['Discipline 2'] = df['Discipline 2'].replace({
    'Hammer': 'Throws',
    'Middle Distance': 'Middle Distance (800m-1500m)'
})

# Verify
print(df['Discipline 2'].value_counts())

Discipline 2
Long Distance (3000m+)          243
Sprints (400m or less)           74
Middle Distance (800m-1500m)     50
Throws                           44
Jumps                            17
Athlete Support Personnel         8
Combined Events                   6
Steeplechase                      4
Unknown                           4
Race Walk                         3
Name: count, dtype: int64
In [24]:
def group_discipline(d):
    if 'Long Distance' in d:
        return 'Long Distance'
    elif 'Middle Distance' in d:
        return 'Middle Distance'
    elif 'Sprints' in d:
        return 'Sprints'
    elif 'Throws' in d:
        return 'Throws'
    elif 'Jumps' in d:
        return 'Jumps'
    elif 'Steeplechase' in d:
        return 'Steeplechase'
    elif 'Race Walk' in d:
        return 'Race Walk'
    elif 'Combined' in d:
        return 'Combined Events'
    elif 'Support' in d or 'Personnel' in d:
        return 'Athlete Support Personnel'
    else:
        return 'Unknown'

df['Discipline Group'] = df['Discipline 2'].apply(group_discipline)
print(df['Discipline Group'].value_counts())

Discipline Group
Long Distance                243
Sprints                       74
Middle Distance               50
Throws                        44
Jumps                         17
Athlete Support Personnel      8
Combined Events                6
Steeplechase                   4
Unknown                        4
Race Walk                      3
Name: count, dtype: int64

In [31]:
#Install & Import Visualization Libraries
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import seaborn as sns

# Makes charts look professional
sns.set_theme(style='whitegrid')
plt.rcParams['figure.figsize'] = (10, 6)

print("Libraries ready!")

Libraries ready!
In [33]:
#Global Cases by Country (Top 10)
top_countries = df['Nationality'].value_counts().head(10).reset_index()
top_countries.columns = ['Nationality', 'Cases']

plt.figure(figsize=(12, 6))
sns.barplot(data=top_countries, x='Nationality', y='Cases', 
            hue='Nationality', palette='Reds_r', legend=False)
plt.title('Top 10 Countries by Doping Cases', fontsize=16, fontweight='bold')
plt.xlabel('Country', fontsize=12)
plt.ylabel('Number of Cases', fontsize=12)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
In [34]:
#Kenya Cases by Discipline
ken_discipline = ken['Discipline Group'].value_counts().reset_index()
ken_discipline.columns = ['Discipline', 'Cases']

plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))
sns.barplot(data=ken_discipline, x='Cases', y='Discipline',
            hue='Discipline', palette='Blues_r', legend=False)
plt.title('Kenya Doping Cases by Discipline', fontsize=16, fontweight='bold')
plt.xlabel('Number of Cases', fontsize=12)
plt.ylabel('Discipline', fontsize=12)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
In [35]:
#Kenya Cases Over Time
ken_year = ken['Year'].value_counts().sort_index()

plt.figure(figsize=(12, 6))
sns.lineplot(x=ken_year.index, y=ken_year.values, marker='o', color='red', linewidth=2)
plt.title('Kenya Doping Cases Over Time', fontsize=16, fontweight='bold')
plt.xlabel('Year', fontsize=12)
plt.ylabel('Number of Cases', fontsize=12)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
In [36]:
# Kenya Gender Split
ken_sex = ken['Sex'].value_counts()

plt.figure(figsize=(6, 6))
plt.pie(ken_sex.values, labels=ken_sex.index, autopct='%1.1f%%',
        colors=['#2196F3', '#E91E63'], startangle=90)
plt.title('Kenya Doping Cases by Gender', fontsize=16, fontweight='bold')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

#Age Distribution of Kenyan Athletes
plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))
sns.histplot(ken['Age'].dropna(), bins=10, color='orange', kde=True)
plt.title('Age Distribution of Kenyan Doping Cases', fontsize=16, fontweight='bold')
plt.xlabel('Age at Time of Infraction', fontsize=12)
plt.ylabel('Number of Athletes', fontsize=12)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
In [38]:
 #Kenya vs Top 5 Countries
top5 = df[df['Nationality'].isin(['KEN', 'IND', 'RUS', 'ETH', 'CHN'])]
top5_discipline = top5.groupby(['Nationality', 'Discipline Group']).size().reset_index(name='Cases')

plt.figure(figsize=(12, 6))
sns.barplot(data=top5_discipline, x='Nationality', y='Cases', 
            hue='Discipline Group', palette='Set2')
plt.title('Doping Cases by Country and Discipline (Top 5)', fontsize=16, fontweight='bold')
plt.xlabel('Country', fontsize=12)
plt.ylabel('Number of Cases', fontsize=12)
plt.legend(bbox_to_anchor=(1.05, 1), loc='upper left')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
In [45]:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

# Pull values directly from your dataframe
total_cases = len(df)
kenya_cases = len(df[df['Nationality'] == 'KEN'])
kenya_share = f"{kenya_cases/total_cases*100:.1f}%"
total_countries = df['Nationality'].nunique()

# Data
labels = ['Total Cases', 'Kenya Cases', 'Kenya Share', 'Total Countries']
values = [total_cases, kenya_cases, kenya_share, total_countries]
colors = ['#185FA5', '#E24B4A', '#BA7517', '#3B6D11']

fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 4, figsize=(16, 6))
fig.suptitle('ATU Doping Cases — Quick Summary', 
             fontsize=20, fontweight='bold', y=1.02, color='#2C2C2A')

for i, (ax, label, value, color) in enumerate(zip(axes, labels, values, colors)):
    cylinder = plt.Rectangle((0.2, 0.15), 0.6, 0.55,
                               color=color, alpha=0.85,
                               transform=ax.transAxes,
                               clip_on=False)
    top = mpatches.Ellipse((0.5, 0.70), 0.6, 0.15,
                            color=color, alpha=1.0,
                            transform=ax.transAxes,
                            clip_on=False)
    bottom = mpatches.Ellipse((0.5, 0.15), 0.6, 0.15,
                               color=color, alpha=0.55,
                               transform=ax.transAxes,
                               clip_on=False)
    ax.add_patch(cylinder)
    ax.add_patch(bottom)
    ax.add_patch(top)
    ax.text(0.5, 0.44,
            str(value),
            fontsize=26,
            fontweight='bold',
            color='white',
            ha='center',
            va='center',
            transform=ax.transAxes,
            zorder=5)
    ax.text(0.5, 0.92,
            label,
            fontsize=14,
            fontweight='bold',
            color='#2C2C2A',
            ha='center',
            va='center',
            transform=ax.transAxes,
            zorder=5)
    ax.plot([0.2, 0.8], [0.87, 0.87],
            transform=ax.transAxes,
            color=color,
            linewidth=2,
            clip_on=False)
    ax.axis('off')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

role.columns = ['Role', 'Cases']

plt.figure(figsize=(10, 5))

            hue='Role', palette='Blues_r', legend=False)
plt.title('Distribution by Role', fontsize=16, fontweight='bold')
plt.xlabel('Number of Cases', fontsize=12)
plt.ylabel('Role', fontsize=12)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

year_trend.columns = ['Year', 'Cases']

plt.title('Global Doping Cases Over Time',
          fontsize=16, fontweight='bold')
plt.xlabel('Year', fontsize=12)
plt.ylabel('Number of Cases', fontsize=12)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
In [53]:
#Kenya v Ethiopia
ken_eth = df[df['Nationality'].isin(['KEN', 'ETH'])]
ken_eth_disc = ken_eth.groupby(['Nationality', 'Discipline Group']).size().reset_index(name='Cases')

plt.figure(figsize=(12, 6))
sns.barplot(data=ken_eth_disc, x='Discipline Group', y='Cases',
            hue='Nationality', palette={'KEN': '#E24B4A', 'ETH': '#185FA5'})
plt.title('Kenya vs Ethiopia — Cases by Discipline',
          fontsize=16, fontweight='bold')
plt.xlabel('Discipline', fontsize=12)
plt.ylabel('Number of Cases', fontsize=12)
plt.xticks(rotation=30, ha='right')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
In [55]:
#Country comparison
In [56]:
top8 = df['Nationality'].value_counts().head(8).reset_index()
top8.columns = ['Country', 'Cases']

plt.figure(figsize=(12, 6))
bars = sns.barplot(data=top8, x='Country', y='Cases',
                   hue='Country', palette='coolwarm', legend=False)

# Add value labels on top of bars
for bar in bars.patches:
    bars.annotate(f'{int(bar.get_height())}',
                  (bar.get_x() + bar.get_width() / 2., bar.get_height()),
                  ha='center', va='bottom', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')

plt.title('Top 8 Countries by Doping Cases',
          fontsize=16, fontweight='bold')
plt.xlabel('Country', fontsize=12)
plt.ylabel('Number of Cases', fontsize=12)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
In [57]:
# Save cleaned file to your desktop
import os

desktop = os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), 'Desktop')
df.to_csv(os.path.join(desktop, 'ATU_Doping_Cleaned.csv'), index=False)

print("File saved to Desktop successfully!")

File saved to Desktop successfully!
